title: Aravind Srinivas @AravSrinivas · 6月4日 Expert call transcripts now inside Perplexity Computer for deep financial research and analysis
summary: Aravind Srinivas @AravSrinivas · 6月4日 Expert call transcripts now inside Perplexity Computer for deep financial research and analysis 引用 Jeff Grimes @jeffgrimes9 · 6月4日 The Guidepoint MCP is now available in Perplexity Computer, allowing Guidepoint customers to integrate 100,000+ expert interview transcripts into their finance AI workflows, with traceable citations back to the original transcript. 17 3 92 1.3万
